images.name: Golden State Warriors vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights
images.caption: Golden State Warriors vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights

articles.description: Golden State Warriors vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights
articles.headline: Golden State Warriors vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights

images.name: Scuffle in Warriors-Nuggets results in 3 technicals
images.caption: Tempers flare between the Warriors and Nuggets that leads to technical fouls for Zeke Nnaji, De'Anthony Melton and Gary Payton II.

articles.description: — Nikola Jokic had 25 points and 15 rebounds, Jamal Murray had 20 points, and the surging Denver Nuggets beat the short-handed Golden State Warriors 116-93 on Sunday night.
articles.headline: Jokic has 25 points, 15 rebounds, Nuggets beat Warriors 116-93 for their 6th straight win

images.name: Scottie Barnes [600x400]
images.credit: Photo by Vaughn Ridley/NBAE via Getty Images

articles.description: The Raptors used a 31-0 run in the first half to rout the Magic 139-87 on Sunday, the longest unanswered run in the play-by-play era.
articles.headline: Raptors use 31-0 run to pummel sputtering Magic

images.name: Jayson Tatum scores season-high 32 as Celtics reach 50 wins
images.caption: Jayson Tatum pours in 32 points as the Celtics defeat the Hornets for their 50th win of the season.

articles.description: The Celtics are headed back to the playoffs thanks to another 50-win season. Not too bad for a "gap" year, according to Jaylen Brown.
articles.headline: Jaylen Brown pokes fun at doubters as Celtics reach 50 wins

articles.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 30 points, including 10 in the fourth quarter, and the Oklahoma City Thunder defeated the New York Knicks 111-100 on Sunday night.

categories.description: New York Knicks @ Oklahoma City Thunder

event.description: New York Knicks @ Oklahoma City Thunder

articles.headline: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 30 points and finishes strong as Thunder beat Knicks 111-100
